release_notes: Probe spawn switched from Start-Process -RedirectStandard* (which creates parent with CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE and exposes chrome subprocess consoles) to System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo + UseShellExecute=false + CreateNoWindow=true. CREATE_NO_WINDOW now propagates to the entire chrome tree — no more renderer/gpu/utility console windows on the desktop. Reads stdout/stderr async via ReadToEndAsync before WaitForExit so OS pipe buffers don't deadlock chrome.
